PROJECT.NAME: icScaAbbr5
PROJECT.TITLE: Scarites abbreviatus, genome assembly, icScaAbbr5, alternate haplotype.
PROJECT.DESCRIPTION: This project provides the genome assembly of Scarites abbreviatus. The assembly is provided by the European Reference Genome Atlas (ERGA, https://www.erga-biodiversity.eu/) via the Biodiversity Genomics Europe project (BGE, https://biodiversitygenomics.eu/).

PROJECT.NAME: icScaAbbr5-mito
PROJECT.TITLE: Scarites abbreviatus, mitochondrial assembly, icScaAbbr5-mito.
PROJECT.DESCRIPTION: This project provides the mitochondrial assembly of Scarites abbreviatus. The assembly is provided by the European Reference Genome Atlas (ERGA, https://www.erga-biodiversity.eu/) via the Biodiversity Genomics Europe project (BGE, https://biodiversitygenomics.eu/).
